title: EU Carbon Border Adjustment: Trade flow implications for cement and steel
excerpt: The CBAM mechanism creates an effective tariff equivalent of 18–24% for high-carbon imports by 2026. Weekly flow data shows early rerouting by Turkish and Indian producers.

title: U.S.–China Phase Two uncertainty: What the data shows about decoupling in electronics
excerpt: ITC data shows a 31% decline in direct US electronics imports from China since Q1 2024, with a corresponding 28% surge through Vietnam and Malaysia — suggesting trans-shipment rather than genuine decoupling.
